title: Emergency Case Thinking Framework
summary: How to read an ED case: identify instability, name the life threat, act first, then refine the diagnosis.

title: The First 60 Seconds
summary: A focused mental script for arrival: sick/not sick, airway, breathing, circulation, disability, exposure, and immediate rescue actions.

title: What Can Kill the Patient Now?
summary: A red-flag lens that converts long differentials into immediate threats requiring rapid recognition.

title: Chief Complaint Pathways
summary: How chest pain, dyspnea, shock, AMS, trauma, pediatric, toxicology, and OB/GYN presentations map to major killers.

title: Resuscitation Before Diagnosis
summary: Why unstable physiology is treated while the exact label is still being clarified.

title: ECG, POCUS, and Labs in ED Cases
summary: How to use ECG, bedside ultrasound, and critical labs as decision accelerators, not decorative tests.

title: Disposition Thinking
summary: How to decide who needs resuscitation bay, monitored bed, admission, urgent specialty involvement, or safe discharge planning.

title: Handover and Consult Logic
summary: How to communicate the case: one-line diagnosis, current threat, actions completed, pending decisions, and escalation need.

title: Pitfalls and Cognitive Errors
summary: Common misses: anchoring, premature closure, normal vital sign bias, single-diagnosis thinking, and false reassurance.

title: SEG Case Page Template
summary: The reusable structure for every case page in this package.

title: STEMI / OMI Chest Pain
summary: An occluded coronary artery causing ongoing myocardial necrosis and malignant dysrhythmia.

title: Aortic Dissection Mimicking ACS
summary: Aortic rupture, tamponade, stroke, or catastrophic bleeding if anticoagulation is given blindly.

title: Pulmonary Embolism Chest Pain
summary: Obstructive shock from massive PE or sudden decompensation from right ventricular failure.

title: Pericarditis vs Cardiac Tamponade
summary: Tamponade physiology causing obstructive shock.

title: Esophageal Rupture After Vomiting
summary: Mediastinitis and septic shock from esophageal perforation.

title: Tension Pneumothorax Chest Pain
summary: Obstructive shock from intrathoracic pressure collapsing venous return.

title: Severe Asthma Near Respiratory Failure
summary: Respiratory arrest from fatigue and dynamic hyperinflation.

title: COPD Exacerbation with Hypercapnia
summary: Hypercapnic respiratory failure, arrhythmia, or missed pneumonia/PE/heart failure mimic.

title: Acute Pulmonary Edema
summary: Hypoxemic respiratory failure and cardiogenic shock if pump failure progresses.

title: Pneumonia with Sepsis
summary: Septic shock and respiratory failure.

title: Anaphylaxis with Airway Threat
summary: Airway obstruction and distributive shock.

title: Carbon Monoxide Exposure
summary: Hypoxic cellular injury, myocardial ischemia, neurologic injury, fetal harm in pregnancy.

title: Upper Airway Obstruction
summary: Complete airway obstruction during delay or failed intubation.

title: Undifferentiated Shock
summary: Cardiac arrest from untreated obstructive, distributive, cardiogenic, or hemorrhagic shock.

title: Septic Shock
summary: Progressive vasodilatory shock, organ failure, and death from delayed source control/antimicrobial therapy.

title: Hemorrhagic Trauma Shock
summary: Exsanguination and traumatic cardiac arrest.

title: Cardiogenic Shock
summary: Pump failure causing systemic hypoperfusion and pulmonary edema.

title: Obstructive Shock from Tamponade
summary: Mechanical obstruction to cardiac filling.

title: Anaphylactic Shock
summary: Distributive shock and airway collapse.

title: Adrenal Crisis
summary: Refractory shock from cortisol deficiency.

title: Hypoglycemia Altered Mental Status
summary: Brain injury or death from unrecognized reversible neuroglycopenia.

title: Acute Ischemic Stroke
summary: Irreversible brain injury if reperfusion-eligible stroke is not identified quickly.

title: Intracranial Hemorrhage
summary: Herniation, expanding hematoma, airway loss, and death.

title: Status Epilepticus
summary: Neuronal injury, hypoxia, acidosis, aspiration, hyperthermia, and refractory seizures.

title: Meningitis / Encephalitis
summary: Sepsis, cerebral edema, seizures, and neurologic injury from delayed antimicrobial therapy.

title: Sepsis Delirium in Elderly
summary: Occult sepsis and shock missed because presentation is atypical.

title: Hyponatremic Seizure
summary: Cerebral edema and recurrent seizures from acute severe hyponatremia.

title: Heat Stroke
summary: Cellular heat injury, rhabdomyolysis, DIC, liver failure, and death.

title: Opioid Overdose
summary: Respiratory arrest and hypoxic brain injury.

title: TCA / Sodium Channel Blocker Overdose
summary: Malignant dysrhythmia and refractory shock from sodium-channel blockade.

title: Salicylate Toxicity
summary: Cerebral/pulmonary edema, severe acidosis, and death if acidemia worsens CNS penetration.

title: Acetaminophen Overdose
summary: Delayed hepatic failure if risk is missed early.

title: Organophosphate Poisoning
summary: Respiratory failure from secretions, bronchospasm, muscle weakness, and seizures.

title: Methanol / Ethylene Glycol Toxic Alcohol
summary: Severe acidosis, blindness, renal failure, and death.

title: Cyanide Toxicity in Smoke Inhalation
summary: Cellular inability to use oxygen despite delivery, causing rapid cardiovascular collapse.

title: Serotonin Syndrome
summary: Hyperthermia, rhabdomyolysis, seizures, and cardiovascular collapse.

title: Lithium Toxicity
summary: Neurotoxicity, seizures, dysrhythmia, and prolonged toxicity due to renal handling.

title: Ventricular Fibrillation Arrest
summary: No effective cardiac output; death without immediate resuscitation.

title: Pulseless Ventricular Tachycardia
summary: Cardiac arrest with shockable rhythm.

title: Complete Heart Block with Instability
summary: Low cardiac output, syncope, ischemia, or progression to arrest.

title: Hyperkalemia ECG Collapse
summary: Sudden malignant dysrhythmia from membrane instability.

title: Wide Complex Tachycardia Stable vs Unstable
summary: Degeneration to arrest or incorrect drug choice in undifferentiated wide tachycardia.

title: Wellens Pattern After Pain Resolves
summary: Critical proximal LAD lesion with high risk of large anterior MI.

title: Brugada Syncope
summary: Sudden ventricular arrhythmic death.

title: Primary Survey Polytrauma
summary: Death from missed ABC threat before diagnostic workup.

title: Head Injury on Anticoagulants
summary: Intracranial hemorrhage with delayed recognition.

title: Flail Chest / Pulmonary Contusion
summary: Respiratory failure from pain, contusion, and impaired ventilation.

title: Blunt Abdominal Trauma
summary: Occult intra-abdominal hemorrhage or hollow viscus injury.

title: Pelvic Fracture Hemorrhage
summary: Massive retroperitoneal bleeding.

title: Burns with Inhalation Injury
summary: Progressive airway edema and inhalational poisoning.

title: Febrile Infant
summary: Invasive bacterial infection or sepsis with subtle signs.

title: Pediatric Respiratory Distress
summary: Respiratory failure from fatigue or upper/lower airway obstruction.

title: Pediatric Dehydration
summary: Hypovolemic shock and electrolyte/glucose abnormalities.

title: Pediatric Seizure
summary: Status epilepticus, hypoglycemia, CNS infection, trauma, or toxic ingestion.

title: Child Abuse Red Flags
summary: Ongoing harm, missed intracranial/abdominal injury, unsafe discharge.

title: Ectopic Pregnancy
summary: Ruptured ectopic pregnancy causing hemorrhagic shock.

title: Preeclampsia / Eclampsia
summary: Seizure, stroke, pulmonary edema, HELLP, maternal/fetal death.

title: Postpartum Hemorrhage
summary: Exsanguination and shock.

title: Ovarian Torsion
summary: Ovarian ischemia and loss if detorsion is delayed.

title: Septic Abortion
summary: Septic shock, uterine perforation, pelvic infection.

title: Trauma in Pregnancy
summary: Maternal hemorrhage, placental abruption, fetal compromise; maternal stabilization is fetal resuscitation.

title: Crashing Airway
summary: Hypoxic arrest during delayed or poorly planned airway intervention.

title: Post-Intubation Hypotension
summary: Cardiac arrest from reduced venous return, medication effect, missed tension pneumothorax, or severe acidosis.

title: Procedural Sedation Complication
summary: Hypoxia, aspiration, hemodynamic collapse.

title: DKA / HHS Crisis
summary: Shock, cerebral edema risk, potassium shifts, and coma.

title: Unstable Angina / NSTEMI
summary: Progression to occlusion MI, arrhythmia, shock, or missed ACS.

title: Pulmonary Embolism with Syncope
summary: Massive/submassive PE with RV failure.

title: Undifferentiated Coma
summary: Airway loss, hypoxia, hypoglycemia, opioid toxicity, trauma, sepsis, or intracranial catastrophe.

title: Spinal Cord Injury
summary: Permanent neurologic injury and neurogenic shock.

title: Pediatric Sepsis
summary: Rapid progression to shock and cardiac arrest.

title: Cannot Intubate Cannot Oxygenate
summary: Hypoxic arrest without immediate rescue oxygenation.

title: Mcq Bank
summary: Practice resource

title: Mini Cases
summary: Practice resource

title: What Can Kill Now Prompts
summary: Practice resource
